LibraryMonster.note: "This monster has a squishy body... You really can find Puni just about anywhere."<CR>"You're right. They aren't very strong, but you need to be careful if they swarm you."
"This Puni is green."<CR>"Maybe they colored themselves green for camouflage? Then they could blend in with grass and other plants..."<CR>"...I really doubt they're thinking that deeply about it."
"This Puni is red... I wonder why?"<CR>"Well you see, it's from the blood of their prey..."<CR>"Eek! Really!? Uu, that's scary..."<CR>"Don't lie. That's just their natural color."
"It's a golden Puni! It's so unusual! ...Maybe we could sell it for a lot of money if we catch it?"<CR>"No, it might be golden, but it's still just a Puni... I doubt anyone would want to buy it."
"Ugh, it's all pitch black and sinister looking... Even though it's just a Puni."<CR>"Yes. Its strength is also nothing to take lightly... Even though it's just a Puni."
"...Puni Puni?"<CR>"No, that's wrong. It's 'Punipuni?'."<CR>"...How's that any different?"<CR>"The real question is, how is it the same?"
"Um... S-super...?"<CR>"This is a superior Puni. It's said that this is the evolved form of a Puni, after a long time has passed. Its strength should not be taken lightly."
"Admiral...?"<CR>"Yes, as in the commander of a fleet. It must mean that this is a Puni leader."<CR>"...That actually doesn't sound very impressive."
"It's a floating book... Is it different from you?"<CR>"Don't compare Plachta to that!"<CR>"It's upsetting that you would compare me to this."<CR>"O-oh... Sorry..."
"This is a flying book monster. It looks like there's some sort of picture drawn inside."<CR>"Oh, you're right. What could it be...?"<CR>"Maybe that picture is the actual monster?"
"Hmm, a living grimoire, huh..."<CR>"What are you thinking about?"<CR>"Since there's a living grimoire, I was wondering if there could be living novels or snack books, too."
"It seems this book contains forbidden knowledge."<CR>"*Gulp*. Maybe it tells you how to make tons of money...?"<CR>"...I doubt that would be considered taboo."
"Apparently this book seizes the souls of the living, trapping them in its pages."<CR>"I want to be written about in books some day, but not like that..."

"It would seem that this book, filled with knowledge of all creation, has taken on life."<CR>"I bet I could become an amazing alchemist if I read this, but... That seems like cheating, so I don't really want to."
"I-it's a ghooost!"<CR>"...I knew that you can't handle ghosts, but is it so bad that you need to shout?"<CR>"Of course! I hate ghosts! I don't want them near me!"
"This ghost is all red. They seem to be especially aggressive towards Sophie and Monika... I guess they don't like you?"<CR>"I don't want a ghost to like me, anyway!"
"This ghost is wearing a silk hat. It seems to act like a gentleman, too."<CR>"...That's a lie. It wants to trick me by acting that way, then eat me. That's definitely it!"
"It seems that this is a dangerous ghost, using magical fire to burn the souls of humans."<CR>"Uu, it's just a ghost, but it does more than just scare you... What a nuisance..."
"Bahahaha! This one has a really funny face! Something like this can't be scary to you, can it?"<CR>"...Don't judge things by their faces. Ghosts are always plotting something terrible!"
"These are shadows of women who died unnatural deaths, and couldn't throw away their attachment to this world."<CR>"I can understand why you would be attached, but no need to cause trouble..."
"It's a cute plant that can walk around. You must like them too, Oskar."<CR>"No, don't let them trick you, Sophie. They're monsters that just take the form of plants."
"This is a plant monster... Right?"<CR>"Yeah. It's a dangerous monster that spreads poisonous pollen when it feels threatened."<CR>"Really? ...I'm glad I didn't try to pet it."
"This monster has a really poisonous color..."<CR>"You need to be careful about the seeds it shoots from its mouth. They have a lot of power, so you won't get off lightly if you're hit."
"This monster smells kind of nice..."<CR>"Watch out! Smelling that will make you hallucinate, then it'll plant its seeds inside you."<CR>"Its seeds!? Wow, that could have been dangerous..."
"...This monster has a dangerous name."<CR>"It has a terrible cry. It's said that hearing it will make you go mad, then die..."<CR>"Ah, so it wasn't just its name that's dangerous..."

"Ugh, it's all black, and it looks emotionless... This monster's scary, you don't know what it's thinking..."<CR>"Don't stare into its eyes. I don't know the reason why, but you can end up paralyzed."
"Wow! This is really cute!"<CR>"It might look like this, but it's still a demon. Be careful. Although they mostly just enjoy playing pranks on people..."
"This is a type of imp. Its claws are coated in poison to make you numb and disabled."<CR>"I didn't know... I guess that means we shouldn't approach it carelessly."
"As its name suggests, this is a small demon. As a young demon, it follows the orders of grown demons."<CR>"It probably won't be so cute when it grows up..."
"This is a type of imp that always acts in large groups. They attack prey as a group, and play every trick in the book on them."<CR>"That actually sounds pretty nasty..."
"Its horns are all curly and cute."<CR>"Those horns are said to store vast magical power. It can unleash magic that rivals that of even greater demons."

"Demon... Lord...? Something this tiny?"<CR>"Don't judge things by their appearances. It may have been sealed, but it was once a demon lord. It is endowed with a nearly infinite supply of magical power."
"This is a bird monster. They raid fields and prey on livestock, so farmers really hate them."<CR>"I'd be shocked if a bird like this showed up in my fields, too."
"This is one of the larger species of birds. Due to its appearance, it's often called the king of birds."<CR>"There sure are a lot of kings, in that case..."<CR>"It's mostly just a nickname, anyway."
"Those talons are really sharp... You'd be done for if it caught you..."<CR>"It's actually able to capture prey that's larger than itself, so you need to be careful."

"This bird's name is like a person's name."<CR>"Apparently the person who first discovered it was named Gustaf... Although he died of his wounds soon after making the bird's existence known to the public."
"Wow, this one's ridiculously big."<CR>"Yeah. It's even bigger than Oskar..."<CR>"A single flap of its wings can create huge gusts. We need to be careful..."
"It's said that this enormous bird is blessed by the moon itself."<CR>"I see... It's true that it's as beautiful as the moon..."
"A beast's body, and the tail of a snake... I wonder which one is in control?"<CR>"I don't know, but they work together when attacking, making it very troublesome."
"This monster got its name because it moves as fast as lightning."<CR>"Yeah... If you try to follow its movements, it's so fast that you'll end up dizzy..."
"If you were bitten by fangs that big, it would probably be fatal..."<CR>"It has a habit of hiding its presence, then ambushing prey. We need to be careful for surprise attacks..."
"The tail of this beast is more developed in this type than others. It's said that the head and tail each possess their own will."<CR>"I wonder if they ever fight?"
"Silent... What's so silent about it?"<CR>"Apparently, it's because it kills its prey so fast that they don't even have time to cry out."<CR>"Ah, so the monster itself isn't silent..."
"This monster looks really heated up..."<CR>"Its fangs are as hot as burning metal. It cauterizes the wound when it bites, making it so that it can't heal properly."

"This type of fish inhabits the waterside. It's fairly gentle, and there aren't many stories of humans being attacked. They actually approach playfully."<CR>"That playfulness is actually what's threatening."
"This fish has a large horn. It's quick when swimming in the water, but it can't move very fast on land."<CR>"I want to decorate my atelier with those horns..."
"If you look closely, you can see star-like patterns on its body..."<CR>"Yes. Seeing them swimming in the water is almost like watching the night sky."
"This subspecies of land fish uses a great roar to create a shockwave, stunning its prey."<CR>"It's loud enough to make your ears ring..."
"This is unusual. It's said that this monster spends most of its lifetime deep in the water."<CR>"...Maybe we shouldn't have attacked it, since it comes out on land so rarely."
"This monster is also known as the ruler of the deep. There's even a legend that says it swallowed a small island."<CR>"An island!? ...Do islands even taste good?"
"A-a moving skeleton!?"<CR>"I heard that these monsters are born when wandering souls possess the bodies of the dead."<CR>"Does that mean they're ghosts!? Nooo!"
"This is a type of Lich. They lurk in the shadows of the living, slowly sapping their souls. Look, Sophie. In your shadow..."<CR>"AAAAAAH! I HATE GHOSTS!"
"It's said that this monster interrogates humans about the deeds performed during their lives after they die."<CR>"If it means being questioned by a ghost like this, I'll never, ever die!"
"This is an upper ranking Lich. It has very high intelligence, and can even use magic."<CR>"It has a really scary face. If it popped out of nowhere, I'd probably faint..."
"Since it's a sorcerer, that means it's not a ghost, right?"<CR>"No, Liches with particularly high magic abilities are given that title."<CR>"Ghosts that can use magic are the worst..."
"This is said to be the king of Liches, able to manipulate the souls of the dead to create more Liches."<CR>"Souls...? Does that mean I'd be turned into a Lich when I die? ...*Sniffle*"
"Demons... A type of monster with particularly high intelligence and ferocity..."<CR>"Its horns and claws are really sharp... It also has a big body, it looks really strong..."
"Demons are usually aggressive, but this rare type doesn't enjoy fighting. It's unusual for them to leave their own territory."<CR>"Maybe they're trying to protect something...?"
"This demon is said to guard the gates of Hell. It's so vicious that it'll attack anything that enters its sight."<CR>"That means we just need to avoid being seen..."
"This is an individual among demons with particularly strong power. It's strong, but the magic it uses is also a major threat."<CR>"Is it kind of like the king of demons?"
"Just looking at this monster makes me feel hot..."<CR>"This demon has the ability to control powerful flames. Naturally, its strength is great as well, so you need to be careful."

"This is a rare type of demon that appears with storms. There's always wind blowing around it, and not even a single blade of grass is left in its wake."<CR>"We needs to be careful not to be blown away..."
"Really big dragon..."<CR>"This is a dragon at the top of the natural world. Its scales can deflect all but the strongest attacks. This thing lives up to its name."
"There's a legend that says when this dragon appears, the world will be engulfed in flames."<CR>"Really? Then does that mean... We saved the world?"
"According to legend, this dragon is related to the sun. As a follower of the spirit of light, it burns the wicked until nothing is left."<CR>"...I'm glad I didn't do anything bad."

"This powerful dragon's duty is to purge those that threaten the world, along with its kin. The light of the moon is its source of vitality."<CR>"...Huh? Doesn't that mean that this is a good dragon?"
"She's a really pretty girl."<CR>"She's not a human, Sophie. She's an embodiment of nature, known as an elemental spirit. This spirit appears to rule the wind."
"This spirit rules ice. Contrary to her beautiful appearance, she's very cruel, finding enjoyment in freezing and killing living creatures."<CR>"Uu, I don't ever want to freeze to death..."
"This spirit rules light. It's said that she possesses a superior position among spirits, controlling harmony of the world itself."<CR>"It's true that she seems kind of divine..."
"A demon king... Does that mean it's the king of monsters?"<CR>"Yes. As its name suggests, it possesses immense power."<CR>"...I wonder if Puni are subjects of this king, too?"
"The king of beasts, huh... That's a pretty awesome name. But as a super amazing super alchemist, I won't lose to a beast king!"<CR>"...Sophie, you don't need to try to compete."
"His left arm was mutated due to a curse received from a monster..."<CR>"He lost control of himself, too... Monster curses are really scary..."
Nazarus's body was afflicted by the power of alchemy. Julio pursued him to avenge his father, but he found that Nazarus had lost much as well. As a result, he embraced alchemy instead.
"Luard. He was an exceptional alchemist. I wouldn't be exaggerating to say he was a genius."<CR>"T-to think you'd say that much about him, Plachta... He must have been really amazing."
As he gained the knowledge of alchemy, his existence itself was transformed into "something". All things no longer have a meaning to this being, only the fact that he continues to change.

★統治するものダミーテキスト
"It's said to have challenged its wits against a sage renowned for their great wisdom, and still won."<CR>"Huh, I wonder if it could stand up to Plachta. Of course, Plachta would win."
